tasks.task: Complete a normal bounded code change and verify the structured report.
Complete a change with relevant tests and verify the reported commands exist.
Cancel during implementation and verify durable cancellation with zero orphan processes.
Crash and recover a read-only phase without duplicating a completed effect.
Reconcile a write phase left in unknown state without a blind retry.
Create a Git publication conflict and verify Baldr blocks or reconciles it safely.
Upgrade Baldr and verify configuration, SQLite state, and rollback availability.
Reuse a compatible provider session and invalidate an incompatible session.
Run competing workers and verify the stale lease holder cannot persist results.
Complete a run and verify secrets are absent from logs, telemetry, and evidence.
